Title: Verify user can login with valid credentials
Description: The user loggs in with his credentials and enters the right username and password
Steps: 1.Open ParaBank;2.Enter username;3.Enter password;4.Click Log In button
Expected Result: User is logged in and Accounts Overview page is displayed

Title: Verify login fails with invalid password
Description: The user tries to log in with correct username and worng password
Steps: 1.Open ParaBank;2.Enter valid username;3.Enter invalid password;4.Click Log In button
Expected Result: User remains on login page and error message is displayed

Title: Verify login fails with empty fields
Description: The user attempts to log in without entering username and password
Steps: 1.Open ParaBank;2.Leave username blank;3.Leave password blank;4.Click Log In button
Expected Result: Login is denied and error message is displayed

Title: Verify new user registration with valid data
Description: The user creates a new account by entering all required valid registration details
Steps: 1.Open Register page;2.Fill all mandatory fields;3.Click Register button

Title: Verify registration fails with missing required fields
Description: The user attempts registration while leaving mandatory fields empty
Steps: 1.Open Register page;2.Leave SSN and confirm password fields empty;3.Click Register button

Title: Verify account overview displays account balances
Description: The logged in user views available accounts and their balances
Expected Result: List of accounts with balances is displayed

Title: Verify transfer funds between accounts
Description: The user transfers money successfully between two available accounts
Preconditions: User is logged in with multiple accounts
Steps: 1.Login;2.Open Transfer Funds;3.Select from/to accounts;4.Enter amount;5.Click Transfer button
Expected Result: Transfer completes successfully and confirmation message is shown

Title: Verify transfer fails with zero amount
Description: The user attempts to transfer funds using zero amount
Expected Result: System prevents transfer and displays validation

Title: Verify transfer fails with negative amount
Description: The user attempts to transfer funds using a negative amount value

Title: Verify bill payment with valid details
Description: The user completes bill payment successfully using valid payee details and amount
Steps: 1.Open Bill Pay;2.Enter payee details;3.Enter amount;4.Click Send payment button

Title: Verify bill payment fails with empty payee name
Description: The user attempts bill payment without entering payee name
Steps: 1.Open Bill Pay;2.Leave payee name empty;3.Fill remaining fields;4.Click Send payment button

Title: Verify user can update profile information
Description: The user edits and saves profile contact information successfully

Title: Verify transaction history is displayed
Description: The user opens an account and reviews transaction history records

Title: Verify user can logout successfully
Description: The user logs out from the application successfully
Expected Result: User session ends and Home page is displayed

Title: Verify browser back button does not restore active session after logout
Description: The user checks whether browser back button restores access after logout
Steps: 1.Click Log out button;2.Click browser Back button
Expected Result: Protected pages remain inaccessible and user stays logged out
